what: Submit knowledge entry update to the backend
why: Persist the edited knowledge entry by re-validating, writing changes to the vault, re-auditing, and re-indexing

success_handling.criteria: Backend confirms the changes are written, audited, and indexed — SSE completed event received

error_handling.description: Show error that the edited entry failed server-side validation
Show error that the entry was modified by another process since loading
Show error that the backend is unreachable
